results.notes: The prohibition 'output.eligible = false AND instance.impactLevel = rights-impacting' was translated to SMT-LIB. Z3 proved that the constraint holds for all possible input combinations: no assignment of (output.eligible, instance.impactLevel) satisfies the forbidden condition without triggering escalateToHuman. The onViolation action is structurally guaranteed to fire.
Field scope permission verified: the set {eligible, reason, confidence, riskFactors} is finite and enumerable. Any output field not in this set triggers reject. Proven safe by finite set membership.

The prohibition references 'parameters.eligibilityThreshold' which is a temporal parameter resolved at runtime. The verifiable constraint subset (Advanced S8.2) excludes external function calls. The temporal resolution is not statically decidable -- this constraint requires runtime enforcement only.
